calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laralei Paras of The Chanler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Plaintiff Anthony Held.
Christine Reynolds of Taylor & Anderson LLP telephone number 949-390-6503 appeared by telephone for Defendant Lehigh Consumer Products LLC.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Anthony Held's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with Proposition 65. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley Anne DeYoung, CSR #6780. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Continued To Dec-28-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
